title: Support RHS of ==? or !=? as a indexed element into parameter array

features.name: wildcard equality with indexed array element on RHS
features.description: Code should include a wildcard equality operator (==? or !=?) where the right-hand side is an indexed element of an unpacked array

features.name: wildcard inequality with indexed array element on RHS
features.description: Code should include a wildcard inequality operator (!=?) where the right-hand side is an indexed element of an unpacked array
